name: prompt-vault
description: Save, search, tag, and manage reusable AI prompts via the pv CLI — a local SQLite-backed library with version history, tag filtering, and JSON export/import.

interface.shortDescription: Save, search, tag, and manage reusable AI prompts via the pv CLI — a local SQLite-backed library with version history, tag filtering, and JSON export/import.
interface.longDescription: Use the pv CLI to add prompts with comma-separated tags, search by substring, list or filter by tag, and export the library to JSON for backup.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Prompt Vault safely.
